name: OneLogin
description: Monitor OneLogin SSO and identity management platform for user access and MFA compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to OneLogin Administration
2. Go to Developers → API Credentials → New Credential
3. Select 'Read users' scope
4. Copy Client ID and Client Secret
5. Base64 encode 'client_id:client_secret': echo -n 'id:secret' | base64
6. Enter encoded value and your region (us or eu)

credentialFields.label: Encoded Credentials
credentialFields.helpText: Base64 encode 'client_id:client_secret'. Found in OneLogin Administration → API Credentials → New Credential. Command: echo -n 'id:secret' | base64

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews OneLogin users with SSO access to connected applications

checks.name: 2FA
checks.description: Verifies OneLogin MFA policies are configured for user authentication
